mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP Hamming-distance gradient ratchets the codepoint field toward the 0x0E37 constant; vpc adds the cmplog I2S stage, which interferes with the gradient climb and prevents reliable placement of 0x0E37.
one_line: CMP_MAP gradient ratchets codepoint to 0x0E37; vpc's added I2S stage interferes

mechanism_summary: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the intercepted codepoint==0x0E37 CMP and directly substitutes 0x0E37 into matching byte offsets; vpc's added CMP_MAP gradient stage interferes, blocking reliable constant placement.
one_line: I2SRandReplace copies 0x0E37 operand directly into input; VP addition interferes

mechanism_summary: cmplog's I2SRandReplace substitutes U+0EB9 (b9 0e 00 00) from the CCC118 CmpLog entry directly into the codepoint slot; vpc's added CMP_MAP stage inflates corpus with off-path interesting-bucket seeds, starving the I2S-found path.
one_line: I2SRandReplace plants U+0EB9 bytes for CCC118 gate; VP corpus inflation starves path

mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP Hamming-distance feedback steers byte mutation toward a 0x0E00-block Lao codepoint satisfying CCC118; vpc's added I2S stage floods the corpus with substituted off-path seeds that crowd out the CMP_MAP-steered trajectory.
one_line: CMP_MAP gradient steers bytes toward Lao CCC118 codepoint; I2S addition floods corpus
